evidence.note: Taxonomic: Y Combinator delivers Seed Funding & Investment — it provides capital and investor access directly to early-stage founders. This is the primary output of the YC program. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Seed Funding is the required capability.
Taxonomic: Antler delivers Seed Funding & Investment — it co-founds companies from day zero and provides pre-seed capital as its primary offering. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Flexport delivers Supply Chain Sourcing — it provides end-to-end logistics execution and supplier coordination. The capability output (contracted, visible supply chain) is the primary deliverable of the Flexport platform. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Beehiiv delivers Community Growth Operations — it provides the infrastructure for audience acquisition, engagement, and retention. The platform output (subscribed, active community) is the primary deliverable. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Pentagram delivers Brand & Creative Direction — it provides end-to-end brand strategy and visual identity systems. The creative output (brand system, positioning) is the primary deliverable of the consultancy. No missionId required.

Taxonomic: Psychology Today delivers Couples Therapist Matching — it operates the largest verified therapist directory with specialisation filters including couples therapy, accepting new clients, and telehealth availability. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Couples Therapist Matching is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Open Path Collective delivers Couples Therapist Matching — its network of vetted therapists specialises in relationship work and is accessible via its directory. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Couples Therapist Matching is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Open Path Collective delivers Affordable Therapy Access — its sliding-scale model ($30–$80/session) directly addresses financial access barriers for couples therapy. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Affordable Therapy Access is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Fastweb delivers Scholarship Search & Matching — it matches students to 1.5M+ scholarships using profile data including major, background, and financial situation. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Scholarship Search & Matching is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Going Merry delivers Scholarship Search & Matching — it provides personalised scholarship discovery with a single application shared across multiple programs. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Scholarship Search & Matching is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Going Merry delivers Scholarship Application Coaching — it includes essay tools, counselor access, and scholarship-specific guidance within its platform. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Scholarship Application Coaching is the required capability.

Taxonomic: SCORE delivers Business Credit Assessment & Building — its volunteer mentors include former bankers and CFOs who provide structured guidance on business credit building at no cost. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Business Credit Assessment & Building is the required capability.

Taxonomic: U.S. Small Business Administration delivers Business Credit Assessment & Building — its resource partners and lending programs include credit-building pathways for businesses not yet qualifying for standard loans. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Business Credit Assessment & Building is the required capability.

Taxonomic: SCORE delivers Small Business Grant Search — its mentors maintain knowledge of federal, state, and foundation grant programs applicable to small business sectors. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Small Business Grant Search is the required capability.

Taxonomic: U.S. Small Business Administration delivers Small Business Grant Search — it administers SBIR/STTR programs and maintains grant resource directories for small business owners. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Small Business Grant Search is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Mobileye delivers Traffic Safety Data Analysis — it provides REM road safety mapping and crowd-sourced incident detection for municipal risk corridor analysis. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Traffic Safety Data Analysis is the required capability.

Taxonomic: NACTO delivers Urban Safety Intervention Design — it publishes the Urban Street Design Guide and provides technical assistance to cities designing Vision Zero interventions. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Urban Safety Intervention Design is the required capability.

Taxonomic: VolunteerMatch delivers Volunteer Recruitment Platform — it connects NGOs with 13M+ registered volunteers and supports role-based matching for specific skill requirements. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Volunteer Recruitment Platform is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Galaxy Digital delivers Volunteer Recruitment Platform — its platform includes a public-facing volunteer portal with role listings, applications, and onboarding flows. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Volunteer Recruitment Platform is the required capability.

Taxonomic: Galaxy Digital delivers Volunteer Coordination & Retention — its core product is volunteer management — scheduling, shift tracking, communications, hours reporting, and retention analytics. No missionId required; valid in all contexts where Volunteer Coordination & Retention is the required capability.
